chart-error-chart-definition-not-found: Error message when the chart definition page is not found. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-chart-definition-invalid: Error message when the chart definition page is invalid. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-data-source-invalid: Error message when the chart tabular data source is invalid. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-data-source-page-not-found: Error message when the chart tabular data source is not found. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-default-source-not-specified: Error message when the chart definition page does not specify a default data source page. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-incompatible-chart-definitio: Error message when the chart definition page is incompatible with charts. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-incompatible-data-source: Error message when the tabular data source page is incompatible with charts. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-invalid-data-source: Error message when the tabular data source page is invalid. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-invalid-height: Error message when the width parser function parameter is not an integer or is too small. Show to the user in Codex message box.
chart-error-invalid-width: Error message when the width parser function parameter is not an integer or is too small. Show to the user in Codex message box.
chart-error-shell-disabled: Error message when shell execution is disabled. Shown to user in Codex message box.
chart-error-rendering-error: Error message when executing the service or shell script returned an error.
chart-error-unexpected: Error message when an unexpected technical error happened when rendering a chart. Shown to the user in a Codex message box.
chart-error-category:
{{Tracking category name}}
Name of tracking category that pages are placed into when a chart fails to render.
chart-error-category-desc: Description of the chart error tracking category.
chart-render-category:
{{Tracking category name}}
Name of tracking category that pages are placed into when a chart is used on them.
chart-render-category-desc: Description of the chart render tracking category.
chart-render-tooltip-nodata: Message displayed in the chart's tooltip when there's no data.
chart-visualeditor-mwchartdialog-title: Title for the VisualEditor chart dialog and context item
chart-visualeditor-mwchartdialog-chart-l: Label in the VisualEditor chart dialog for the chart definition input
chart-visualeditor-mwchartdialog-data-la: Label in the VisualEditor chart dialog for the tabular data source input
chart-wizard-disabled: Message displayed at Special:ChartWizard when the feature flag is disabled.
chart-wizard-tab-label: Label for the chart wizard tab
chart-wizard-create-title: Title for the create form shown at Special:ChartWizard when no chart definition page was specified.
chart-wizard-create-text: Introductory text for the form to create a new chart definition page.
chart-wizard-create-name-label: Label for the chart definition page name field.
chart-wizard-create-name-help: Help text for the chart definition page name field.
chart-wizard-create-submit: Label for the submit button that continues from the create form to the chart wizard.
chart-wizard-create-invalid-name: Validation error shown when the chart definition page name is invalid.
chart-wizard-create-exists:
Error shown above the create form when the chart definition page already exists. Parameters:
* $1 - the chart definition page title.
* $2 - the Special:ChartWizard page title for editing the existing chart definition page.
chart-wizard-create-not-allowed: Validation error shown when the user cannot create or edit the chart definition page.
chart-wizard-create-invalid-subpage: Warning shown when Special:ChartWizard was opened with an invalid subpage.
chart-wizard-form-source-label: Label of the dataset field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-source-description: Description of the dataset field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-source-placeholder: Placeholder of the source dataset field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-configure-label: Label of the configure chart fieldset in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-configure-description: Description of the configure chart fieldset in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-label: Label of the chart type field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-placeholder: Placeholder of the chart type field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-line: Label for the line chart type option in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-line-description: Description for the line chart type option in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-bar: Label for the bar chart type option in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-bar-description: Description for the bar chart type option in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-area: Label for the area chart type option in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-area-description: Description for the area chart type option in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-pie: Label for the pie chart type option in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-type-pie-description: Description for the pie chart type option in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-categories: Label for the categories field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-categories-placeholder: Placeholder for the categories field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-categories-no-results: Message displayed in the category search field in the chart wizard form when no results are found
chart-wizard-form-language-label: Label for the language field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-language-description: Description for the language field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-language-translated: Label for the group of translated languages in the 'Language' dropdown of the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-language-untranslated: Label for the group of untranslated languages in the 'Language' dropdown of the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-title-label: Label for the chart title field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-subtitle-label: Label for the chart subtitle field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-subtitle-description: Description for the chart subtitle field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-x-axis-label: Label for the X-axis field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-y-axis-label: Label for the Y-axis field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-axis-format-label: Label for the axis format field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-publish-label: Label of the publish chart fieldset in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-publish-description: Description of the publish chart fieldset in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-form-license-label: Label for the license field in the chart wizard form
chart-wizard-preview-placeholder-title: Title shown in the chart wizard preview area as a placeholder
chart-wizard-preview-placeholder-descrip: Description shown in the chart wizard preview area as a placeholder
chart-wizard-preview-error: Message displayed in the chart wizard preview area when an error occurs.
chart-wizard-preview-error-retry: Label for the button to retry previewing a chart in the chart wizard.
chart-wizard-preview-chart-view: Label for the chart preview view switch button.
chart-wizard-preview-data-view: Label for the tabular data preview view switch button.
chart-wizard-publish: Label for the button to publish a chart in the chart wizard
tag-chart-wizard:
Short description of the chart-wizard tag.

Shown on lists of changes (history, recentchanges, etc.) for each edit made using Chart Wizard software.
tag-chart-wizard-description: Description of the {{msg-mw|tag-chart-wizard}} change tag, shown at [[Special:Tags]].
chartjson-error-version: Error message displayed when validating a chart JSON page if the version key ($1) is invalid; parameters $2 and $3 are the valid integer range.
chartjson-error-enum: Error message displayed when a chart JSON value $1 needs to be one of a specific list of values and isn't; parameter $2 is the command-separated list of acceptable values.
chart-error-source-not-found: Error message when the chart tabular data source page is not found.
chart-error-invalid-source-type: Error message when the chart tabular data source page is of an invalid type.
chart-error-invalid-source-content: Error message when the chart tabular data source page's contents are invalid.
chart-error-transforms-disabled: Error message when the chart uses a transform but transforms are disabled.
chart-error-request-too-large: Error message when the chart and tabular data combined size exceed the maximum allowed size of $1, determined by the ChartRequestSizeLimit configuration. The size will be automatically formatted with appropriate units and number formatting for the user's language. Also provide a link to documentation on data transformation options available via lua modules.
